title: Comparison of integer and decimal
description:
Query 1:
SELECT ?X WHERE
{
     BIND ("5"^^xsd:integer AS ?X)
     FILTER (?X = "5.0"^^xsd:decimal)
}

Result 1:
5

Query 2:
SELECT ?X WHERE
{
     BIND ("5"^^xsd:integer AS ?X)
     FILTER (?X != "5.0"^^xsd:decimal)
}

Result 2:
5

Integer 5 is equal and inequal to decial 5 at the same time.
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id Int32, value Decimal(10, 2), description String);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value, description) VALUES (1, 5.0, 'Five point zero');
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value, description) VALUES (2, 5, 'Five integer');
SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE value = toInt32('5');
SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE value != toDecimal('5.0');
